dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The rules-context-loader step executed with perfect schema validation and generated a very high volume of reasoning tokens (7,929), exceeding baseline performance in information density and adherence to governance protocols.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The evolution map successfully ingested over 48,000 tokens of architectural context. While reasoning output was slightly lower in volume compared to the baseline, the structural integrity remained perfect with no status failures.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Both the alignment-engine and the architecture-intent-generator reached 'ok' status with zero schema errors. The intent generator produced a clean, actionable output, successfully mapping constraints to intentions.
